nasb.text: Edom, however, said to him, “You shall not pass through us, or I will come out with the sword against you.”

esv.text: But Edom said to him, “You shall not pass through, lest I come out with the sword against you.”

cnv.text: 以東王對使者說：“你不可從我這裡經過，免得我帶著刀出來攻擊你。”

ccb.text: 以东王却说：“你们不可从我这里经过，否则我必兵戎相见。”
